programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S2/E68 - Army'. Jack is the new dog at school and the newest recruit in Rusty's Army. Jack struggles with following instructions and always forgets his hat, but Rusty will make a soldier of him yet.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S2/E69 - Fancy Restaurant'. Bingo and Bluey want mum and dad to smoochy kiss, so they set up a romantic evening for two at their fancy restaurant. Everything goes to plan, until chef Bingo's special arrives.

programme.title: Dog Squad
programme.desc: 'S1/E13 - Mission: Pet Shop'. Mum gives Rayane and his hearing dog Diesel a mission to get some dog food and a new toy from the pet shop.

programme.title: Ranger Hamza's Eco Quest
programme.desc: 'S2/E7'. Ranger Hamza and the Ramblers go on an eco quest to find out all about orchards.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S2/E91 - Circus'. Bluey is the ringmaster in a game of circus with her friends, but Hercules wants to play his motorcycle game instead. Luckily, Bluey has a solution to keep everyone happy.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S2/E101 - Burger Shop'. It's time for Bluey and Bingo to get out of the bath. But Dad has decided not to tell them what to do and gets roped into a game of Burger Shop.

programme.title: Swashbuckle
programme.desc: 'S8/E24 - Captain Captain's Best Bits'. In this special compilation episode, Squawk takes us on a journey to find Captain Captain's top Swashbuckle moments. We will see her silliest songs, most marvellous moments and messiest slops.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E16 - Yoga Ball'. Bingo loves playing with Dad, but sometimes he forgets Bingo is smaller than her sister. Mum teaches Bingo how to use her big girl bark to keep the fun within her limits.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - Shadowlands'. On a picnic in the park, Bluey and her friends play Shadowlands. Coco keeps taking shortcuts so Bluey has to show her that following the rules can make the game more fun.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - The Weekend'. At the weekend, Bluey and Bingo are playing in the garden with Dad. But Bingo gets upset when she discovers a walking leaf insect and Dad doesn't notice.

programme.title: Swashbuckle
programme.desc: 'S7/E21'. Seaweed arrives on deck playing a new game called Sandcastle Squish on his console, but Captain Captain takes it off him and quickly becomes obsessed with it.

programme.title: Swashbuckle
programme.desc: 'S7/E22'. A carrier seagull delivery service for shipwrecked pirates, called Wing It Now, has been launched. Captain Captain, Sandy and Seaweed each choose something for delivery.

programme.title: Topsy And Tim
programme.desc: 'S1/E64 - Coming Home'. Tim and Dad are going to Bellford Hospital to pick up Topsy and Mummy. As he waits for Dad, Tim finishes the faces that Topsy and Kerry had started drawing in the mud on the side of the car.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E39 - The Sleepover'. A sleepover with their cousin means Bluey and Bingo get to stay up late! But when Muffin shows up exhausted after missing her nap, the girls get more fun than they bargained for.

programme.title: Sleepy Time Stories - Xitsonga
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Episode 1'. To celebrate South African Heritage Month, Cbeebies Sleepy Time Stories will shine a spotlight on some of the popular native languages Isizulu, Sesotho, Tsonga and Afrikaans.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S2/E55 - Dance Mode'. After Dad eats her last chip, Bingo is given three chances to put Mum and Dad in 'Dance Mode' as payback. But the others can't resist taking Bingo's turns for her.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S2/E90 - Muffin Cone'. When Muffin can't stop sucking her thumb, she has to wear a cone of shame. But the cone gets in her way and she can no longer play 'sandwich shop' with Bluey and Bingo.

programme.title: Twirlywoos
programme.desc: 'S1/E57 - More About Stretching'. A man stretches his swimming trunks then places them in his suitcase. The Twirlywoos have a go at stretching them too! On the Boat, The Twirlywoo Screen shows something stretchy.

programme.title: Roots and Fruits
programme.desc: 'S1/E15'. Live from the Roots & Fruits theatre, it's tiny Brussels Sprout performing I'm Mighty and proving how great he is.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: 'S1/E95 - Tiddlytubby Party'. Tinky Winky finds a party invitation and shows it to Dipsy, Laa-Laa and Po. The invitation takes flight and the Teletubbies follow it to find a Tiddlytubbies' party.

programme.title: In The Night Garden ZinkyZonk Specials
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - HaaHoos'. When the toys of the Night Garden cant sleep, the Zonk leads them to the ZonkyZoney, an enchanted grove where they can zinkyzzzonk in peace.

programme.title: Colourblocks
programme.desc: 'S1/E15'. The animated adventures of friends who bring colour to the world. Colours learn about themselves through adventure and play with the Colourblocks.

programme.desc: 'S1/E7 - Noddy and the Case of the Little Lost Toy'. Smartysaurus is delighted when a little clockwork duck appears at the DinoLab. No-one knows where she's come from, but Noddy is sure that her family must be missing her.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E52 - Verandah Santa'. It's Christmas Eve and Dad and the kids are taking turns pretending to be Santa.

programme.title: Postman Pat: Special Delivery Service

programme.title: JoJo & Gran Gran

programme.title: JoJo & Gran Gran

programme.title: eToonz Resumes At 06h00
programme.desc: A magic portal to free quality kids entertainment, the perfect place for kids from toddlers to tweens to explore a wonderland of fun.

programme.title: Grade 12 Life Sciences
programme.desc: 'S3/E19 - Ideas About Origins'. We explore ideas about origins. We are referring to the origins of life and how organisms have changed over time.

programme.title: Grade 12 Life Sciences
programme.desc: 'S3/E20 - Evolution by Natural Selection'. This lesson focuses on further exploring Darwin's ideas, which led to the theory of natural selection as the mechanism that causes evolution.

programme.title: Grade 12 Life Sciences
programme.desc: 'S3/E21 - Speciation and Evolution in Present Times'. We learn how speciation takes place by focusing on some examples. We will look at mechanisms that keep species reproductively isolated or separate.

programme.title: Grade 12 Life Sciences
programme.desc: 'S3/E22 - Human Evolution'. In this episode, we will be exploring evidence for our common ancestry with African apes.

programme.title: Grade 12 Life Sciences
programme.desc: 'S3/E16 - Human Endocrine System'. We learn what we mean by hormones and endocrine glands, where we find them, what hormones they produce, and their functions. And look at some endocrine system disorders.

programme.title: Grade 12 Life Sciences
programme.desc: 'S3/E17 - Homeostasis in Humans'. We look at what homeostasis is, negative feedback mechanisms and thermoregulation.

programme.title: Big School Afrikaans
programme.desc: 'S1'. A collection of locally produced animation in the Afrikaans Language aimed at pre school level, made by Africans for Africans.

programme.title: Big School English
programme.desc: 'S1/E1'. A collection of locally produced animation aimed at preschool level, made by Africans for Africans.

programme.title: Big School IsiXhosa
programme.desc: 'S1'. A collection of locally produced animation in the IsiXhosa Language aimed at pre school level, made by Africans for Africans.

programme.title: Mathematics Teacher Talk
programme.desc: 'S1/E24 - Surface Area & Volume'. In this lesson, we look at the surface area and volume equations, and how these are derived. This forms an important basis for the teaching of surface area and volume.

programme.title: Great Lesson Ideas
programme.desc: 'S1/E7 - Algebraic Equations: Word Problems'. In this foundation phase module the learners complete a short activity to assess their understanding of the lesson objective.

programme.title: Grade 1 Numeracy
programme.desc: 'S2 - Space and shape'. We learn about space and shape by describing, sorting and comparing 3-D objects in size, colour, objects that roll and objects that slide.

programme.title: Grade 2 Numeracy
programme.desc: 'S3 - Position and views'. We learn about spaces and shapes through interpreting and drawing the top, side and bottom views of a collection of objects.

programme.title: Grade 3 Numeracy
programme.desc: 'S3 - Name 3-D objects'. We learn about spaces and shapes through recognising and naming 3-D objects in the classroom and in pictures. To get lesson notes on this episode send a whatsapp to +27 60 070 3308 with the code G3T3W5E1.

programme.title: Incremental Introduction of...
programme.desc: 'Incremental Introduction of African Languages (IIAL). E1 - IsiXhosa'. This program aims to offer children a chance to learn the African languages of IsiXhosa and IsiZulu, in a fun and interactive way.

programme.title: Grade 4 Mathematics
programme.desc: 'S3/E39 - Understanding a simple book review'. We look at a simple book review (Part 2).

programme.title: Grade 5 Mathematics
programme.desc: 'S3/E39 - Play time (Dialogue)'. We look at play time dialogue.

programme.title: Grade 6 Mathematics
programme.desc: 'S3/E39 - Dictionary work'. We look at dictionary work.

programme.title: Grade 7 Mathematics
programme.desc: 'S3 - Mathematical Language'. We look at using mathematical language.

programme.title: Grade 7 Natural Science
programme.desc: 'S3/E29 - Potential and kinetic energy: The Law of Conservation of Energy'. We learn about potential and kinetic energy, mainly the Law of Conservation of Energy.

programme.title: Big School
programme.desc: 'S1/E3'. A collection of locally produced animation aimed at pre school level, made by Africans for Africans.

programme.title: Grade 8 Mathematics
programme.desc: 'S3/E41 - Calculations with Fractions'. We look at the multiplication and division of fractions.

programme.title: Grade 9 Mathematics
programme.desc: 'S3/E40 - Expand and Simplify Expressions'. We learn to Simplify algebraic expressions involving monomials, binomials and trinomials.

programme.title: Grade 10 Life Sciences
programme.desc: 'S3/E24 - The Main Groups of Organisms on Earth'. We focus on a classification system known as the five-kingdom classification system.

programme.title: TenFold Preparation Show
programme.desc: 'S3/E3 - Physical Science'. In this series of TenFold shows we prepare you for our live shows in order for you to get the most out of them

programme.title: Ten Fold Live
programme.desc: 'S1 - Mathematical Literacy'. In this TenFold live show repeat we answer learners questions sent in by learners.

programme.title: Ten Fold Live
programme.desc: 'S1 - Mathematical Literacy'. In this TenFold live show repeat we answer learners questions sent in by learners.

programme.title: Grade 11 Life Sciences
programme.desc: 'S2/E27 - Other aspects of gaseous exchange'. We will be introduced to a number of different kinds of interactions that take place in the environment.

programme.title: Siyaya, Come Wild With Us
programme.desc: 'S2 - Cederberg - The Secret Library'. Four young explorers set of on a source to sea expedition. First they need to find the source of the Palmiet River high in the mountains.

programme.title: Siyaya, Come Wild With Us
programme.desc: 'S2 - The Hottentots holland mountains - Crossing the mountains'. As they search for a way across the mountain range they have to climb to near the top and then have to criss-cross a dangerous narrow gorge while hanging off cables.

programme.title: Grade 10 Life Sciences
programme.desc: 'S3/E25 - Exam Questions on the Environment'. We look at exam questions relating to the work we covered on the ecosystem.

programme.title: Grade 11 Life Sciences
programme.desc: 'S3/E24 - Excretion in Humans'. We will begin by understanding why wastes need to be excreted and then we will move on to examine the organs of excretion in humans.

programme.title: Grade 12 Life Sciences
programme.desc: 'S3/E18 - Plants Responses to the Environment'. We examine plant responses to the environment. We will focus on some of the major plant hormones, namely auxin, gibberellin and abscisic acid.

programme.desc: 'S1 - Mathematical Literacy'. In this TenFold live show repeat we answer learners questions sent in by learners.

programme.title: Drift Masters Euro Champs '24: FIN

programme.title: Pushing the Limits with...

programme.title: Life
programme.desc: Two men are falsely accused of murder and sentenced to life imprisonment. Their time on the inside teaches them a little lesson about life.

programme.title: Fat Legs
programme.desc: After a breakup Anna flees to Paris, disrupting the idyllic lives of her best friend and his partner in the process.

programme.title: That's Not Me
programme.desc: Polly's dreams of making it as an actor are shattered when her twin sister catapults to international stardom.

programme.title: Robert Whitlow's The Trial
programme.desc: After a horrific death of his family, attorney McClain is on the verge of committing suicide, until he's assigned a capital punishment case that begins to transform his life.

programme.title: About Time
programme.desc: A film about a young man who discovers that he can travel through time and so tries to improve his life with this power.

programme.title: Echelon Conspiracy
programme.desc: When Max Peterson receives a series of mysterious cell phone messages that promise him untold wealth, he soon finds himself the victim of a deadly international plot.

programme.title: Kevin Hart
programme.desc: Kevin Hart a stand-up comedian and now is a Hollywood box office superstar. He might always find a way to get us laughing however he draws his comedy from a tougher part of his life.

programme.title: Skyscraper
programme.desc: Dwayne Johnson puts his body on the line in this heart-thumping action film. A security expert infiltrates a burning skyscraper when his family is taken hostage.

programme.title: Ride Along 2
programme.desc: Ice Cube and Kevin Hart return for another crime comedy filled with drugs, wedding bells and ridiculous antics. All hell breaks loose when the two travel to Miami.

programme.title: It's Complicated
programme.desc: Jane runs into her ex-husband at their son's graduation ceremony. Since they are divorced and he has re-married, problems evolve when they start falling in love all over again.

programme.title: Journal For Jordan
programme.desc: Journal for Jordan is based on the true story of First Sergeant Charles Monroe King, a soldier deployed to Iraq who begins to keep a journal of love and advice for his infant son.

programme.title: Jumping The Broom
programme.desc: Two very different families converge on Martha's Vineyard one weekend for a wedding.

programme.title: The Five-Year Engagement
programme.desc: One year after meeting, Tom proposes to his girlfriend, Violet, but unexpected events keep tripping them up as they look to walk down the aisle together.

programme.title: Bad Boys For Life
programme.desc: The Bad Boys Mike Lowrey and Marcus Burnett are back together for one last ride in the highly anticipated Bad Boys for Life.

programme.title: New Zealand By Train
programme.desc: 'S1/E1'. Commencing from the city of Auckland, New Zealand from a Train travels through the North Island passing viaducts and passing through rich farmlands to the dramatic scenery of the central volcanic plateau.

programme.title: Inside The Factory
programme.desc: 'S5/E5 - Pasties'. Gregg Wallace is in Cornwall at an enormous bakery where they produce 180,000 Cornish pasties a day. He follows the production of the pastry snacks from the arrival of two tonnes of swedes right through to dispatch.

programme.title: The Battle to Beat Malaria
programme.desc: 'S1/E1'. Meet the scientists, doctors and volunteers engaged in the battle against the scourge of malaria.

programme.title: Ben Fogle: Return To The Wild
programme.desc: 'S2/E5 - Fiji, Pacific Ocean'. Ben Fogle is reunited with seafarer Rick, who made a fresh start on the Pacific island of Fiji after previously living off the coast of French Polynesia.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: Canada
programme.desc: 'S2/E1 - Fresh Starts'. Becky and family establish a 'Fish Camp' on the shores of Great Slave Lake.

programme.title: Ottoman Empire By Train
programme.desc: 'S1/E1'. Alice Roberts begins her Ottoman adventure in Adana, near Syria.?She explores an historic mosque and finds out about the origins of Turkish delight.

programme.title: New Zealand By Train
programme.desc: 'S1/E1'. Commencing from the city of Auckland, New Zealand from a Train travels through the North Island passing viaducts and passing through rich farmlands to the dramatic scenery of the central volcanic plateau.

programme.title: Arctic Vets
programme.desc: 'S2/E9'. Dr. Chris must deal with reindeer bullies to keep harmony in the herd, and with ice finally forming on Hudson Bay as polar bear season wraps up, the Alert team releases eight bears back into the wild.

programme.title: Arctic Vets
programme.desc: 'S2/E10'. The new leaders of the Polar Bear Alert team intercept a polar bear mom and her two cubs, helicopter-lifting them to safety. Dr. Chris rushes to treat and release an injured great horned owl.

programme.title: Ancient Egypt By Train
programme.desc: 'S1/E4'. Alice ends her adventure in Aswan, whose quarries provided the granite for the country's vast collection of Ancient Egyptian monuments. She then takes a boat to see the extraordinary Philae Temple.

programme.title: Life Below Zero
programme.desc: 'S10/E13 - Break Up Time Is Wake Up Time'. Our Alaskans emerge from a long winter and seize new opportunities to travel, hunt, and farm while facing the dangers from thawing rivers.

programme.title: Where The Wild Men Are With Ben Fogle
programme.desc: 'S10/E3 - Oregon'. Ben spends time with Pirate Rob, who lives for half the year with his 18-year-old son Damien in a sandbag house on an island in the middle of an industrial river in Oregon.

programme.title: New Zealand By Train
programme.desc: 'S1/E1'. Commencing from the city of Auckland, New Zealand from a Train travels through the North Island passing viaducts and passing through rich farmlands to the dramatic scenery of the central volcanic plateau.

programme.title: The Battle to Beat Malaria
programme.desc: 'S1/E1'. Meet the scientists, doctors and volunteers engaged in the battle against the scourge of malaria.

programme.title: Ben Fogle: Return To The Wild
programme.desc: 'S2/E5 - Fiji, Pacific Ocean'. Ben Fogle is reunited with seafarer Rick, who made a fresh start on the Pacific island of Fiji after previously living off the coast of French Polynesia.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: Canada
programme.desc: 'S2/E1 - Fresh Starts'. Becky and family establish a 'Fish Camp' on the shores of Great Slave Lake.

programme.title: The World's Deadliest Weather
programme.desc: 'S4/E2'. A 19-year-old girl and her father go face-to-face with a fast-moving inferno as wildfires rip through Victoria, Australia. In the French Alps, two British skiers are engulfed by an avalanche.

programme.title: Where The Wild Men Are With Ben Fogle
programme.desc: 'S10/E4 - Tuscany'. In Tuscany, Ben meets British couple George and Sophie who have breathed new life into a farmhouse. George's desire to live self-sufficiently lead to a lifelong project.

programme.title: Life Below Zero
programme.desc: 'S10/E14 - The Burden of Possessions'. With temperatures on the rise, Alaskans must ensure their survival in the hostile Arctic.

programme.title: The World's Deadliest Weather
programme.desc: 'S4/E3'. In Arkansas, two storm chasers help warn people that a tornado is barrelling towards them, wreaking havoc on downtown Jonesboro and leaving a trail of destruction.

programme.title: Where The Wild Men Are With Ben Fogle
programme.desc: 'S8/E10 - Northumberland'. Ben travels to Northumberland where he meets Kezz and Nathalie Petronelli-Stone. Their off-grid and environmentally sensitive approach to life means they don't even have a telly.

programme.title: Seven Worlds, One Planet
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Antarctica'. The latest series from the BBC and Sir David Attenborough explores the continent of Antarctica and its inhabitants, and the challenges faced due to the changing climate.

programme.title: New Zealand By Train
programme.desc: 'S1/E2'. The New Zealand South Island line scales the snow-capped Southern Alps, travels through Maori hunting grounds and finally reaches Christchurch, a city sitting on a volcano.

programme.title: Ottoman Empire By Train
programme.desc: 'S1/E1'. Alice Roberts begins her Ottoman adventure in Adana, near Syria.?She explores an historic mosque and finds out about the origins of Turkish delight.

programme.title: Where The Wild Men Are With Ben Fogle
programme.desc: 'S9/E1 - Portugal'. Adventurer Ben Fogle journeys to the mountains of central Portugal, to live with Alex, a British man who traded in his lucrative retail career for his own mountainside hideaway.

programme.title: Life Below Zero
programme.desc: 'S7/E8 - Ahead of the Game'. Sue travels home to Kavik. Andy and Denise return to Eagle. Jessie prepares for the Iditarod. The Hailstones do chores in Kiwalik.

programme.title: Ben Fogle: Return To The Wild
programme.desc: 'S2/E6 - British Columbia, Canada'. Ben Fogle revisits former war correspondent Julius Strauss and his wife Kristin, who live in British Columbia. Their home is in the middle of a mountainous region that is home to grizzly bears.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: Canada
programme.desc: 'S2/E2 - Seal the Deal'. Kim and Pierre look to the land for a source of emergency food.

programme.title: Ottoman Empire By Train
programme.desc: 'S1/E2'. Alice Roberts is on a train to Ankara on her Ottoman adventure. She visits the tomb of Ataturk who saw out the end of the empire.

programme.title: New Zealand By Train
programme.desc: 'S1/E2'. The New Zealand South Island line scales the snow-capped Southern Alps, travels through Maori hunting grounds and finally reaches Christchurch, a city sitting on a volcano.

programme.title: Ranch To Table
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - Strawberry Season'. Elizabeth uses fresh strawberries to make and preserve homemade jam. Then, she whips up a strawberry shortcake with ginger whipped cream for a family night.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations
programme.desc: 'S8/E1 - Montevideo'. Andrew Zimmern digs into the treasures of Uruguay's capital city, Montevideo. He tries slow-cooked Asado meats and a thin-sliced steak sandwich called chivito.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations
programme.desc: 'S8/E2 - Guayaquil'. Andrew Zimmern digs into the tropical coastal cuisine of Guayaquil, Ecuador. He samples everything from sweet red mangrove crab to a plantain dumpling.

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: 'S56/E8 - Friendsgiving'. Celebrating the trendy tradition of hosting a Friendsgiving meal, four teams of best buddies compete to make the ultimate Thanksgiving feast.

programme.title: Best Bite In Town
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Davis'. Guy Fieri sends Noah Cappe, Tiffani Faison and Jet Tila to hit the restaurant scene in Davis, California, where they find bicycle-friendly eateries and high-end sushi joints.

programme.title: Restaurant: Impossible
programme.desc: 'S19/E3 - Out With Old, In With New'. Robert is in San Diego, California to save a German restaurant stuck in the past. Owner and chef Peter is afraid to change his late dad's design.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins, And Dives
programme.desc: 'S35/E11 - Flavour Expedition'. Guy Fieri's worldwide journey of flavour starts in Caguas, Puerto Rico, with churrasco steak and risotto and ropa vieja dumplings.

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: 'S55/E4 - Julia Child's Kitchen: Part 3'. Four chefs honour Julia Child's legacy and compete to impress guest judge Isabella Rossellini with a potato product that would have made Julia cringe.

programme.title: Spring Baking Championship
programme.desc: 'S7/E3 - Spring Bunnies And Chickens, Oh My!'. Host Ali Khan challenges the bakers to create beautiful edible eggs with a surprise flavour and decorative spring chick.

programme.title: BBQ Brawl: Flay Vs Burrell Vs Tila
programme.desc: 'S3/E7 - Social Media Connection'. Social media is one of the best ways for BBQ cooks to find inspiration. The teams must prove that they know how to cook, and connect, on social.

programme.title: The Kitchen
programme.desc: 'S22/E5 - Retro Remakes'. The gang gives retro recipes some modern upgrades, starting with Geoffrey Zakarian's new-style steak Diane. And, the Casserole Queens spice up mac and cheese.

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: 'S56/E9 - Dont Lose Heart'. Four new chefs must work with an alligator heart in the appetiser basket. Then, an oversized ice cream product has the competitors thinking big for dessert.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations
programme.desc: 'S6/E23 - Oaxaca'. Andrew explores regional specialities in Oaxaca, Mexico. From mole negro, tortilla with pork lard to egg bread dunked in hot chocolate, local tradition flavours each bite.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations
programme.desc: 'S6/E24 - Baja'. Andrew explores the seafood-rich cuisine of Baja California, Mexico. Smoked tuna, fish tacos, and zesty seafood cocktail hangover cures - Baja's cuisine is sensational!

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations
programme.desc: 'S7/E1 - The Hamptons'. Andrew Zimmern travels the globe in search of the most iconic foods that define a location. He discovers the secrets and stories behind the legendary meals.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations
programme.desc: 'S7/E2 - Queens'. Andrew Zimmern travels the globe in search of the most iconic foods that define a location. He discovers the secrets and stories behind the legendary meals.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations
programme.desc: 'S7/E3 - Chicago: A Second Bite'. Andrew Zimmern travels the globe in search of the most iconic foods that define a location. He discovers the secrets and stories behind the legendary meals.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations

programme.desc: 'S34/E5 - Takeout: Sweet And Savory'. A chef from Las Vegas teaches Guy and Hunter how to make his sweet and savoury crepes. Later, they cook up peach cobbler and empanadas.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins, And Dives
programme.desc: 'S34/E6 - Pasta, Potatoes & Pescatarian'. Vanilla Ice takes Guy to his favourite Ecuadorian joint in West Palm Beach, Florida. Plus, Guy is in Minnesota to try scratch-made pasta and poutine.

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: 'S46/E13 - Dressed For Success'. Four chefs are challenged to create a dish containing beer, canned spinach and cookies. Later, they must combine custard dumplings with rainbow liquorice.

programme.desc: 'S3/E3 - Titans Vs Eric Adjepong'. With $25,000 and ultimate bragging rights on the line, Eric Adjepong will have to manage the clock and the pressure from his friends, the Titans.

programme.title: BBQ Brawl: Flay Vs Symon Vs Jackson
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - High Steaks'. Bobby Flay and Michael Symon battle it out in a tomahawk rib-eye challenge. Then the six remaining contenders face off in a fierce Texas beef challenge.

programme.title: Restaurant: Impossible
programme.desc: 'S19/E4 - Dirtiest. Kitchen. Ever.'. Robert Irvine tackles one of the filthiest kitchens of his career in San Diego, California. He discovers the owner has no idea how to run a restaurant.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins, And Dives
programme.desc: 'S35/E12 - Surf And Savoury'. Guy Fieri grabs a little surf, turf and flavours from the earth. In Puerto Rico, a local gem is serving off-the-hook pork trifongo and shrimp empanadas.

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: 'S55/E5 - Julia Child's Kitchen: Part 4'. Four devotees of the cooking icon Julia Child aim to make her proud with a twist on her fish stew. Later, there's an odd combo in the dessert basket.

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: 'S50/E4 - Chef's Best Friend'. Dog-loving chefs have to please a canine judge along with the humans! They must combine a dog-friendly beverage and a pasta dish in the second round.

programme.title: Ciao House
programme.desc: 'S2/E10 - Capo Di Casa'. The two remaining chefs are stunned when some unwelcome guests arrive at the villa. Judges Alex Guarnaschelli and Gabe Bertaccini choose the winner.

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: 'S49/E3 - Comfort Food Feud: Bacon'. The chefs aim for bacon perfection! The appetizer basket includes a Japanese condiment and a bacon-y bar food, with biscuit dough in the entree round.

programme.title: Spring Baking Championship
programme.desc: 'S7/E4 - Spring Romance'. Host Ali Khan pairs up the bakers to create a proposal dessert plate for a spring couple. Next, each baker makes half the cake without seeing their teammate's work!

programme.title: American Monster
programme.desc: 'S10/E1 - We Were Fooled'. When Mark-Eric reports that his wife Sherri has had a tragic accident, their world falls apart. However, an investigation reveals a far darker truth.

programme.desc: Ukeje and his daughter Nsogbu are once a shadow over the community. Their thievery is a constant blight, leaving a trail of empty pockets and violated trust.

programme.desc: A son of a professor falls in love with the wrong person, now he has to show his strength to win the love of his life.

programme.title: Placenta

programme.title: Butterfly
programme.desc: A promise made by the Prince to marry a maiden suffers when he comes across the butterfly - a lady gifted in herbs and heart.

programme.title: Mr. Perfect
programme.desc: Marriage does not make any man responsible, being responsible is by choice.

programme.title: Power Of Love

programme.title: The Clown
programme.desc: Oga John employs two maids, Eno and Dubem, that battles for a space in his heart but he shocks them as he disappoints their imagination.

programme.title: Not So In Love
programme.desc: Ben and Ella fake their marriage just for her to get her mother's company, but amid a fake pregnancy, love finds its way to their hearts.

programme.title: Beautiful Wedding
programme.desc: Dylan Sprouse stars in this romcom. After a crazy night in Las Vegas, Abby and Travis discover they are married. They head to Mexico for a honeymoon with friends and family.

programme.title: Meet The Blacks
programme.desc: Mike Epps stars in this spoof comedy. A Chicago family move into a wealthy Beverly Hills neighbourhood, where, unbeknownst to them, it's 'purge' night.

programme.title: Shamed
programme.desc: A delightful romcom. A magazine editor goes on an island trip to clear her mind and focus on her infamous Shamed List column, only to fall for one of the men on her List.

programme.title: Summering
programme.desc: A touching coming-of-age drama. Four friends, spending their final summer together before middle school begins, find themselves in the middle of an unexpected adventure.

programme.title: Abigail
programme.desc: An exciting Russian fantasy-adventure film. Abigail lives in a city closed off due to an epidemic. Trying to find her sick dad, she learns that the city is full of magic.

programme.title: Rugrats Go Wild!
programme.desc: The Rugrats and the Thornberrys merge for a joint adventure on a rickety boat that gets them marooned on a desert island.

programme.title: Breaking Point
programme.desc: An edgy, dynamic UK dance film. Two estranged teenage brothers, gifted at breakdancing, try out together for the British breakdancing team to compete in the World Championships.

programme.title: Stuart Little 2
programme.desc: Michael J. Fox returns to voice everyone's favourite talking mouse, who heads off on an adventure in this sequel when he races across the city to save a new friend.

programme.title: Camp Hideout
programme.desc: A troublesome crime comedy. After a teen steals an important item from two big-city goons, he hides in a church summer camp and must protect his newfound friends.

programme.title: Richard The Stork 2
programme.desc: Richard, the daring sparrow who was adopted by a stork family, is back for another adventure. He embarks on a solo journey when he realises he won't be his flock leader.

programme.title: Little
programme.desc: Regina Hall learns hard lessons in this comedy. A mean tech mogul gets what's coming to her when she is cursed and turned into her 13-year-old self on the eve of her biggest deal.

programme.title: Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse
programme.desc: An amazing Oscar-winning animation. Teenager Miles Morales becomes Spider-Man and must team up with his five counterparts from other dimensions to stop a threat to all realities.

programme.title: Charlie's Angels: Full Throttle
programme.desc: The Angels return for another high-octane movie. They must recover stolen rings that contain information about the identities of people in witness protection.

programme.title: Mean Girls
programme.desc: A musical twist on a modern classic. A new student is a hit with an A-list girl clique called the Plastics. However, everything changes when she falls for the wrong guy.

programme.title: May December
programme.desc: Natalie Portman and Julianne Moore propel this drama loosely based on a true story. An actress visits a female sex offender she's about to play in a movie to study her and her family.

programme.title: Breaking In
programme.desc: Gabrielle Union is fierce in this captivating thriller. When her two kids are taken hostage after a break-in, a mother must do everything to save them.

programme.title: La Soga 2
programme.desc: An action-packed sequel loaded with twists. Now living a quiet life with his girlfriend, Luisito is dragged back into his old life after she is kidnapped.

programme.title: Safehouse
programme.desc: An intense action thriller. After Carla's brother is murdered, she goes on the run and becomes trapped in a cat-and-mouse game with the CIA, the government and the cartel.

programme.title: Deadly Seduction
programme.desc: A young man hatches a devious plan to destroy a college professor's life and career by framing her husband for murder and seducing her daughter.

programme.title: The New Order
programme.desc: A captivating mystery thriller. An American detective travels to Ukraine to solve a mysterious case involving his former mentor.

programme.title: Silent Night
programme.desc: Joel Kinnaman drives this powerful action movie. A grieving father enacts his long-awaited revenge against a ruthless gang on Christmas Eve.

programme.title: A Dangerous Defense
programme.desc: A complex mystery thriller. A lawyer is tasked with representing her estranged sister, who's accused of murdering their father. Is she responsible, or is it someone else?

programme.title: Avarice
programme.desc: A riveting thriller about a family vacation gone awry. A gifted archer must rely on her skills to save her kidnapped husband and daughter from a team of mercenaries.

programme.title: The Hunger Games
programme.desc: Based on the wildly popular young adult novels. Jennifer Lawrence stars as a fierce young woman who saves her sister by taking her place in a game of death.

programme.title: A Glass Of Revenge
programme.desc: An aspiring sommelier enters a training program. When people in the program mysteriously turn up dead, she finds herself not only framed for their murders but also in mortal danger.

programme.title: The Matrix Reloaded
programme.desc: Keanu Reeves, Laurence Fishburne and Carrie-Anne Moss continue their quest to free the world from the grip of the machines in the pulsating sequel to The Matrix.

programme.title: Wire Room
programme.desc: Bruce Willis and Kevin Dillon star in this thriller. While on wire room duty, a federal agent listens as a hit squad attacks the target. Can he protect him from fifty miles away.

programme.title: Ambush
programme.desc: An action-packed Vietnam War thriller. A small outpost gets ambushed during the war, prompting a US Army squad to take the battle below ground on a high-stakes mission.

programme.title: The 355
programme.desc: A formidable female ensemble propels this spy thriller. Four female spies team up to retrieve a top-secret weapon when it falls into the wrong hands.

programme.title: The Calm Beyond
programme.desc: A tense survival thriller. After a typhoon devastates Hong Kong, a young woman conceals her existence in a ruined building until a small child floats into her life.

programme.title: Full View
programme.desc: Full View makes sense of all the news of the day. The show also features 30 minutes of market sense in-depth.

programme.title: The Late Edition
programme.desc: A 360 view of all the stories that made headlines through packages, features, and interviews. This is also a platform for late-night breaking stories and or any developing news stories through the night.

programme.title: Face The Nation
programme.desc: A hard-hitting show with the incomparable Clement Manyathela, where tough questions are tackled, and leaders will be held accountable.

programme.title: Morning Live
programme.desc: Morning Live focuses on what South Africans are waking up to on the day. The show carries the Diary for the day, Market Sense, General News, Crime and Courts issues, Political issues, Sports News, Live weather and traffic reports.

programme.title: The Agenda
programme.desc: Agenda breaks down the stories of the day, as set in Morning Live, in more detail and giving stories more substance as the story develops. These stories take news agenda forward.

programme.title: On Point
programme.desc: On Point follows the development of the general news of the day in-depth where the show informs viewers on the further developments on the stories. This is a blended segment with 2 hours of general news and markets segment for an hour.

programme.title: SA Today
programme.desc: SA Today is issue-driven and covers regional topical issues in an interview format. Invited guests give more depth on big provincial and regional stories that can be an issue of national importance. It also includes general news.

programme.desc: Full View makes sense of all the news of the day. The show also features 30 minutes of market sense in-depth.

programme.title: Big City Greens
programme.desc: 'S2/E52 - Rent Control/Pool's Gold'. When Gloria's parents visit, she ropes the Greens into escalating lies about her success. Cricket goes on a quest to find the best pool in Big City.

programme.title: Big City Greens
programme.desc: 'S2/E53 - Big Resolution/ Winter Greens'. On New Year's Eve, the Greens and Gloria attempt to set their resolutions. Cricket and Remy challenge Vasquez to a snowball fight, while Tilly creates a snowperson.

programme.title: Big City Greens
programme.desc: 'S2/E54 - Mages & Mazes/ Okay Karaoke'. The kids play a role-playing game at Remy's but his rules lead to conflict. The Greens go out for karaoke, but Tilly struggles to express her true self through song.

programme.title: Klik Klub - Zwakala
programme.desc: 'S2/E19 - Hulisani Ravele'. Hulisani Ravele joins Klik Klub for Heritage Day! Friends bring South African items, share stories, and make heritage foods. Join the celebration of culture and deliciousness.

programme.title: Bunk'd: Learning The Ropes
programme.desc: 'S7/E146 - Wastin' Away Again in Barb-aritaville'. Parker and Destiny plan Kikiwaka's first luau, After being tasked by Destiny to decorate for the luau, Noah, Winnie, and Bill compete in a series of ridiculous games.

programme.title: Bunk'd: Learning The Ropes
programme.desc: 'S7/E147 - Don't Hate the Mayor, Hate the Game'. Jake and Parker compete to be the mayor of Dusty Tush, Lou creates a fake treasure hunt to spend time with Bill and Destiny.

programme.title: Jessie
programme.desc: 'S1/E17 - Gotcha Day'. Jessie is planning Zuri's Gotcha Day - the day her adoptive parents brought her home. As the kids talk about adoption Ravi learns that when Christina and Morgan got him, they were expecting him to be a baby.

programme.title: Jessie
programme.desc: 'S1/E18 - Glue Dunnit: A Sticky Situation'. When Luke and Ravi get into a sticky situation and Mrs Chesterfield's hands get stuck to her head, Jessie is determined to find the culprit. Is it one of her kids?

programme.title: Zombies: The Re-animated Series
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - Training Dae/Youngins & Dragons'. Addison is determined to help Dae, the quirky new witch at school, feel welcome. Zed and little sister Zoey must team up to fight a monster hunter.

programme.title: Zombies: The Re-animated Series
programme.desc: 'S1/E7 - Foul Play/Catch Meat If You Can'. The stress of directing the school play causes Addison's alien energy to fritz. Wyatt teams up with Eliza to help him keep a secret from the wolf pack.

programme.title: Big City Greens
programme.desc: 'S1/E24 - Hiya Henry/People Watching'. Tilly tries ventriloquism for the Big Coffee open mic, but her dummy terrifies Cricket. The family plays the people watching game, making up stories about city folk passing by.

programme.title: Big City Greens
programme.desc: 'S1/E23 - Harvest Dinner/Winner Winner'. Bill and Nancy prep a special harvest dinner, while Cricket and Gramma race Tilly to get a missing ingredient. At the community center, Tilly trains to become a winner!

programme.title: Big City Greens
programme.desc: 'S1/E22 - Night Bill/Cheap Snake'. When Bill sneaks out at night with a mysterious duffel bag in tow, the kids hide in his truck to see where he goes. Cricket impulsively decides to buy a giant pet snake.
